items.title: Unauthenticated PHP object injection in Mirasvit Cache Warmer
items.summary: A critical unauthenticated PHP object injection flaw in Mirasvit Cache Warmer, a popular Magento extension, allows remote code execution via a crafted cookie on any storefront page. All versions before 1.11.12 are vulnerable, and CISA has added it to its KEV catalog due to active exploitation.

items.title: Security Updates Available for Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source
items.summary: This update resolves critical, important, and moderate vulnerabilities that could lead to arbitrary code execution, arbitrary file system write, application denial-of-service, and security feature bypass. Affected versions include Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source 2.4.8-p4 and earlier, and 2.4.7-p9 and earlier.

items.title: PolyShell: Unrestricted file upload in Magento and Adobe Commerce REST API
items.summary: A critical flaw in Magento's REST API allows unauthenticated attackers to upload executable files to any store by disguising code as an image. While fixed in Magento 2.4.9, no isolated patch exists for older production versions, leaving many stores vulnerable.
